---
title: "First Principles"
description: "Making the unintuitive intuitive."
page-layout: full
---

**First Principles** is a blog series covering machine learning and distributed systems from the ground up.

## Series

<div class="series-grid">

<a href="posts/transformers-from-scratch/" class="series-card-link">
<div class="series-card">
<div class="series-card-header">Transformers from Scratch</div>
<div class="series-card-body">
<p>Build a decoder-only transformer end to end - tokenisation, embeddings, feed-forward layers, layer Norms, attention heads, training loops, and inference.</p>
<span class="series-badge">In progress</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>

<a href="posts/distributed-training/" class="series-card-link">
<div class="series-card series-card-soon">
<div class="series-card-header">Distributed Training from Scratch</div>
<div class="series-card-body">
<p>Data parallelism, model parallelism, gradient checkpointing, and the systems that make large-scale training possible.</p>
<span class="series-badge series-badge-soon">Coming soon</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>

</div>
